message:
chore(gitignore): ignore .ntm/ per-repo state directory

Add `.ntm/` to the repo .gitignore so the NTM agent-session manager's
per-repo state (rate-limit tracking under `.ntm/rate_limits.json` plus
any future session metadata files) stops showing up as untracked in
`git status` on every run. The contents are regenerated on demand and
have no business in version control.

This has been showing up across multiple commit-sweep sessions as a
stray untracked file — locking it out at the ignore level means it
is never proposed for commit again.

files.patch:
@@ -255,6 +255,13 @@ __PATCHSET__
 db300_*.toml
 librust_out.rlib
 
+# Codex scratch directory — self-documenting "do not commit" marker, appears during codex sessions
+.codex_tmp_do_not_commit/
+.codex_tmp_do_not_commit
+
+# Oracle / verification evidence dumps (regenerated per run, can be huge)
+evidence/
+
 # NTM agent session directories
 .ntm/
